transcript:
CALLER: Hello, I need to cancel my appointment. I'm actually feeling better and I don't think I need to come in anymore.
AGENT: Glad to hear you're feeling better! Let me find your appointment. Your name and number please?
CALLER: Rahul Menon. 9833221100.
AGENT: Found it. You have an appointment with Dr. Sunita Rao in ophthalmology on Wednesday at 2 PM. Shall I go ahead and cancel?
CALLER: Yes, please cancel it.
AGENT: Done, Mr. Menon. Appointment cancelled. If the symptoms return, please don't hesitate to book again. Take care!
CALLER: Will do, thanks.
